normalization.notes: Store modern Punjabi Gurmukhi in NFC and preserve original reviewed forms. Do not strip vowel signs, tippi, bindi, addak, halant, or nukta-marked loan letters during analysis.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Gurmukhi letters, vowel bearers, dependent vowel signs, inherent vowel, tippi, bindi, addak, halant, pairin letters, and nukta-marked consonants
segmentation.notes: Punjabi uses whitespace for coarse words but Gurmukhi lessons need akshara-aware review. Matras can attach around a base; nasal signs and addak are recurring high-payoff marks.
